    Class Cells

    Provides access to worksheet cells, rows, columns, and merged ranges.

    Inheritance
    object
    Cells
    Inherited Members
    object.Equals(object)
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.GetHashCode()
    object.GetType()
    object.MemberwiseClone()
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.ToString()
    Namespace: Aspose.Cells_FOSS
    Assembly: Aspose.Cells.FOSS.dll
    Syntax
    public class Cells
    Examples
    var workbook = new Workbook();
var cells = workbook.Worksheets[0].Cells;

cells["A1"].PutValue("Total");
cells[1, 1].PutValue(125.75);
cells.Merge(0, 0, 1, 2);

    Properties

    Columns

    Gets column-level settings for the worksheet.

    Declaration
    public ColumnCollection Columns { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    ColumnCollection

    this[int, int]

    Gets a cell by zero-based row and column index.

    Declaration
    public Cell this[int row, int column] { get; }
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    int row
    int column
    Property Value
    Type Description
    Cell

    this[string]

    Gets a cell by A1 reference such as A1 or BC12.

    Declaration
    public Cell this[string cellName] { get; }
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    string cellName
    Property Value
    Type Description
    Cell

    MergedCells

    Gets the current merged-cell regions in worksheet order.

    Declaration

    Rows

    Gets row-level settings for the worksheet.

    Declaration

    Style

    Gets or sets the default style of the worksheet cells scope.

    Declaration
    public Style Style { get; set; }

    Methods

    Merge(int, int, int, int)

    Merges a rectangular cell region using zero-based coordinates.
